title: State Department Is Accused of Slow Assistance in Iran War for Americans Abroad
summary_full: Many veteran diplomats faulted the State Department for its response after the attacks in Iran began, and for its actions beforehand.
summary_public: Many veteran diplomats faulted the State Department for its response after the attacks in Iran began, and for its actions beforehand.

IR.label: negative
